title: enneapogon lophotrichus
intro: Enneapogon lophotrichus, also known as the 'Woolly Witchgrass' or 'Woolly Pogon Grass', is a type of grass found in Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Enneapogon lophotrichus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to make a tea, or by drying and grinding them into a powder for later use.
